folksonomy.description: I-Folksonomy ivumela basebentisi kutsi bangete emathegi lakhetsiwe kumikhicito. Dlulisa emehlo kuto tonkhe tikhiye letikhona ngetansi, sesha tikhiye letitsite, nobe uchafate nobe nguyiphi ikhiye kute ubone imikhicito leyisebentisako.

datasources.title: Imithombo yemininingwane
datasources.also_checked_by: Likhasi lemkhicito liphindze futsi lahlolwa ngu
datasources.last_modified_t: Kuhlela kwekugcina kwelikhasi lemkhicito ku {date} ngu
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Layisha titfombe leticacile temkhicito, titsako, kanye nemaciniso emsoco kute usite labanye babone lomkhicito.
info.basic_info: Niketa imininingwane lebalulekile mayelana nemkhicito, njengelinani, emaphakethe, kanye nemkhiciti.
info.languages: Ngeta emagama emkhicito kanye netinchazelo ngetilwimi letehlukene kwenta lomkhicito ufinyeleleke kubasebentisi labanyenti.
info.ingredients: Bhala tonkhe tintfo letikhona kulomkhicito. Loku kusita basebentisi labane-allergies noma labakhetsa kudla.
info.nutrition: Faka emanani emsoco nga 100g/ml njengoba kukhonjisiwe emaphaketheni. Loku kusita basebentisi kutsi bacatsanise imikhicito.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Ngekukhetsa, faka umbono kute uchaze tingucuko takho nobe unikete umongo lowengetiwe.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Leli nani liyasita kwenta kubalwa lokulinganako kwemsoco ngamunye ngesayizi yekukhonta. Sibonelo, 60 g, 60g noma 60 G (nconota leyo yekucala), 1000 ml noma 1L .
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Khombisa kuphela sigaba lesicondzile kakhulu. Tigaba tebatali titawungetwa ngekuzenzakalela. Sibonelo, ‘Ema Sardines emafutseni emncumo’, ‘Ijusi yewolintshi lesuka ekugcizeleleni’.
tooltips.product_name: Ligama lemkhicito ligama leliyinhloko lelishicilelwe emaphaketheni. Kungaba luphawu lwekuhweba lolubhalisiwe. Sibonelo, 'Nesquik', 'Ketchup yetamatisi'. Ungafaki umkhicito egameni
tooltips.brand_name: Faka tonkhe tinhlobo temkhicito. Umkhicito lomkhulu, lovame kukhonjiswa ngalokucacile ephaketheni lelingaphambili, kufanele ufakwe kucala. Sibonelo, ‘Nutella, ‘Oreo, Mondelez’.
tooltips.quantity: Kopisha linani lelikhonjisiwe kulomkhicito futsi ungakhohlwa emayunithi. Sibonelo, 230g, 6(wemacandza langu 6), 3 x 150g (wemkhicito lonemabhokisi lamatsatfu, ngamunye une 150g).
tooltips.labels: Noma ngusiphi sici semkhicito **lesineliciniso** futsi lesehlukile kuletinye tinsimu. Sibonelo, 'I-Nutri-Score, I-NOVA…', 'Yentiwe eBelgium, ikhicitwa eBrittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Faka sitolo lapho uthenge khona lomkhicito. Sibonelo, 'I-Carrefour', 'I-Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Ngeta noma ngutiphi tinkhomba temvelaphi longatitfola emaphaketheni. Akudzingeki kutsi ukhatsateke ngemvelaphi lekhonjiswe ngco eluhlwini lwetitsako. Sibonelo, ‘Inyama yenkhomo lesuka eArgentina’, ‘Le soya ayiveli eNhlanganweni yase Europe’.
tooltips.traceability_code: Kulesigaba, ungafaka emakhodi lahlobene nemamaki ekupakisha, emamaki ekutatisa noma emamaki emphilo.
tooltips.countries: Emave lapho khona lomkhicito utfolakala khona kakhulu (kungafaki titolo letikhetsekile emikhicitweni yangaphandle).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Name

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

landing.title: Vula Umhloli Wemaciniso Ekudla
landing.subtitle: I-database yekubambisana, yamahhala nalevulekile yemikhicito yekudla levela emhlabeni wonkhe. Tfola, sesha, futsi ufake sandla ekubekeni sobala kwekudla kuwo wonkhe umuntfu.
landing.explore_products_desc: Phenya tigidzi temikhicito yekudla, bona emaciniso emsoco, bese ukhetsa ngekucophelela.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

explore.title: Hlola Emaciniso Ekudla Lokuvulekile
explore.subtitle: Tfola imikhicito lehamba embili, tigaba letidvumile, bese ufaka sandla ekubekeni tintfo ngalokusebaleni kwekudla!
explore.trending_products_desc: Bona kutsi ngumiphi imikhicito lebukwa kakhulu futsi lehlelwa kakhulu nyalo.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Dlulisa emehlo ngetigaba tekudla letithandwa kakhulu ku-database yetfu.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Sita kwenta ncono Emaciniso Ekudla Lokuvulekile ngekwengeta noma kuhlela imikhicito, noma kuphendvula imibuto.
explore.random_product_desc: Utiva unenhlanhla? Tfola umkhicito longakahleleki kusuka ku-database yetfu.
explore.learn_more_desc: Tfola kutsi i-Open Food Facts isebenta njani nekutsi ungasita njani.
